'''Nagem Dr'Lar''', also known as '''Megan Dr'Lar''', was an independent [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] salvager who was salvaging technology and information from the debris left by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. She and a group of technicians were working at a [[Death Star Salvage Site|salvage site]] deep in the jungles.

When [[Jonna]], one of her workers went missing, she asked an individual to help her find him. Unfortunately, that individual found his dead body, and reported back to Nagem. [[Osae Meilea]] was not happy with Nagem running her own operation, however, and sent an individual to deal with her. When the individual informed her of Osae's intentions, she ordered her bodyguard [[Yakasoba]] to attack the individual. After the defeat of her bodyguard, she agreed to follow Osae's intentions.
